unit.name: RNN tradeoffs and vision-language applications
unit.description: Covers practical pros/cons of RNNs and historical computer-vision sequence uses.
unit.summary: RNN advantages include processing arbitrary-length sequences, keeping model size fixed as length grows, and reusing the same weights at every time step [ts=2899s] [ts=2948s]. In theory, hidden states can carry information from far back, but in practice recurrence is hard to batch and fixed-size hidden states lose information over long sequences [ts=2926s] [ts=2982s] [ts=3032s]. In image captioning, a CNN or visual encoder represents the image, often via a pretrained model’s second-to-last layer, and an RNN decoder combines that visual information with previous generated text until an end token appears [ts=3056s] [ts=3076s] [ts=3107s] [ts=3161s]. The instructor notes captioning failures caused by dataset co-occurrence bias and hallucination of common objects or actions [ts=3191s] [ts=3229s]. Other historical applications include VQA, visual dialog, and visual language navigation [ts=3291s] [ts=3364s] [ts=3382s].

key_points.text: RNNs can process arbitrary-length sequences with a fixed-size model.
Sequential dependence makes RNN training hard to batch and scale.
Fixed-size hidden states may lose information from far back in long sequences.
Image captioning can use a pretrained CNN representation as input to an RNN decoder.
Captioning models can hallucinate objects/actions due to dataset co-occurrence bias.

kp_catalog.name: RNN tradeoffs and applications
kp_catalog.description: Arbitrary-length processing and weight sharing versus sequential computation and fixed-state bottlenecks, with CV applications.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because rNN tradeoffs and applications clarifies arbitrary-length processing and weight sharing versus sequential computation and fixed-state bottlenecks, with CV applications, sharpening later modeling, analysis, or evaluation choices.

kp_catalog.name: Character-level autoregressive language modeling
kp_catalog.description: Predicting the next character/token, feeding generated outputs back in, and sampling from probabilities.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because character-level autoregressive language modeling clarifies predicting the next character/token, feeding generated outputs back in, and sampling from probabilities, sharpening later modeling, analysis, or evaluation choices.
